Math Parsing Behavior

\(\alpha + \beta = \chi <script>alert(1)</script>\)

Link Schema Behavior

Standard Verification Link

\[\alpha + \beta = \chi <script>alert(document.domain)</script>\] \[\underline{\text{<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>}}\] \[\msghash = \text{"hello" \color{red}{\cancel{\text{XSS Payload}}}}\]
